name: Caiaphas
oracleText: When Caiaphas enters the battlefield, each opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card unless they pay 2 life.
flavorText: "It is expedient for us, that one man should die for the people." — John 11:50
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics were added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Wenceslaus Hollar's "Jesus before Caiaphas" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: High Priest of Judgment

classics.license: Public domain; Wikimedia Commons hosts a faithful reproduction of a public-domain work.
classics.sourceNotes: This scene anchors Caiaphas in the right judgment setting.
